quality_highlights: pkg/workflow/template_include_validation_test.go: Error messages are clear and use consistent terminology — 'import directives cannot be used inside template regions' is precise and actionable
docs/src/content/docs/guides/open-telemetry.mdx: Excellent use of <details> to collapse the advanced low-level API, keeping primary content scannable; well-structured with clear h2 anchored sections

single_file_improvements.issue: All four status messages use a pervasive newspaper/breaking-news metaphor. Most critically, run-success (line 142) says 'This is a developing story' after the workflow completes — actively misleading. run-failure says 'Our correspondents are investigating' with no actionable guidance. footer uses 'BREAKING:' prefix on every message.

Lines 95-99: Section 'Built-in telemetry emitted by gh-aw' opens with a vague referent — 'These fields are a compatibility contract' (line 97) follows 'gh-aw emits a small set of built-in spans' without specifying what 'fields' means. The stability guarantee is front-loaded before explaining what is actually emitted, reversing the logical read order.
